text: I saw it at Walmart on Black Friday and and I never heard of it or even knew it existed till that day
text_zh: 我在黑色星期五的沃尔玛看到了，之前从来没听过，也不知道它还存在

text: I lowkey wanna get one, I tried it at Best Buy and it was fun!
text_zh: 我有点想买一个，我在Best Buy试过了，挺好玩的！

text: that's cool and all but xbox still sweeps with p effort. gamepass alone solos.
text_zh: 这玩意儿挺酷的，不过 Xbox 还是靠努力赢过一切。光是 gamepass 就 solo 了。

text: Doesn't a telly tv kinda have the offbrand version built in?
text_zh: 电视自带的不是差不多是山寨版吗？

text: PlayStation 5 has web browser and for those that say it don’t, don’t know how to get to it!
text_zh: PlayStation 5 有浏览器，那些说没有的，就是不知道怎么找到！

text: It out sold PlayStation 5 pro of this year also why does it matter on what you play all companies are corrupt and nothings cheap anymore
text_zh: 它今年的销量超过了 PlayStation 5 Pro，而且你玩什么有什么关系？所有公司都腐败，什么都不便宜了

text: I seen one at Walmart it’s just Wii 🤣 it’s made for kids to move to physically
text_zh: 我在沃尔玛看到一个，感觉就是Wii🤣 是给孩子动的。

text: Ps5 does have a web browser it’s just hard to get to
text_zh: PS5 是有浏览器，就是比较难找到

text: Nintendo can’t talk nobody wants the switch 2💔
text_zh: 任天堂说不出话来，没人想要switch 2💔

text: yeah but microsofts net worth still worth more than Sony and Nintendo combined and doubled 🤣
text_zh: 是啊，但微软的净资产还是比索尼和任天堂加起来还多一倍 🤣

text: it just out sold it on the black Friday weekend
text_zh: 黑色星期五周末它销量就超过它了

text: So glad I’m moving away from Xbox best decision of my life ✌️😂
text_zh: 很高兴我离开了 Xbox，这辈子最好的决定 ✌️😂

text: X box lost to a fake Arcade wii bro x box get up
text_zh: Xbox输给了一个假街机Wii老兄，Xbox振作点

text: Ngl I looked at it and tbh why does it actually remind me of the Wii
text_zh: 说真的，我看了看，然后说实话，为什么它真的让我想起了Wii

text: Off topic, what part of Michigan you from? lol
text_zh: 跑题了，你是密歇根哪里的？哈哈

text: I didn’t even know that was a thing
text_zh: 我竟然不知道有这个东西

text: saw one at target
text_zh: 在Target看到一个

text: I know how to fix it
text_zh: 我知道怎么修好它

text: Xbox rn : No shade Xbox I still love y'all👍🏿👀
text_zh: Xbox现在：没有恶意 Xbox我仍然爱你们👍🏿👀

text: 👀 we need to get you a Playground to try
text_zh: 👀 得给你弄个游乐场来试试

text: The nex playground is ahh bro, the only good game on it was fruit ninja and I can get it for free on my phone. And fruit ninja was one of the FREE games, you get free games and the rest are locked behind a paywall. This is a kids console.
text_zh: Nex Playground 那个啊 bro，唯一好玩的游戏是水果忍者，我手机上就能免费玩。而且水果忍者还是免费游戏之一，你得花钱才能解锁其他的。这只是个儿童游戏机。

text: Bro me and some friends went to a Walmart and player it for like 1-2 hours and fried the motherboard, we had to dip after playing bluey keepy uppies
text_zh: 哥们，我和一些朋友去了趟沃尔玛，玩了大概1-2小时，主板就烧了，玩了Bluey的Keepy Uppy后我们得赶紧溜。

text: even work the price hike, Gamepass is best bang for your buck. even on PC it's worth getting for $17
text_zh: 甚至值那个涨价，Gamepass 是性价比最高的。即使在 PC 上，花17块也值

text: 2 years ago you could get series S for 175 and the series X for 350 Play damn double their price in 2 years from that holiday season pricing they had
text_zh: 两年前，你能以175美元买到Series S，以350美元买到Series X。从那个假期的定价来看，两年时间价格翻了一倍多。

text: switch gota browser🫩
text_zh: Switch 有浏览器 🫩

text: yall do know xbox made bank off of them and everyone using their tech😂😂😂😂😂😂. xbox ramped up Kinect and sold the tech. it didnt die like most think. they sold it to the military and things grew quickly. then they sold ot to partnering companies to make digital storage tech and....wait for it......Nex Playground 😉. xbox made baaaaaaank
text_zh: 你们知道Xbox靠这个赚翻天了吧，而且大家都用他们的技术😂😂😂😂😂😂。Xbox大推Kinect然后卖了技术，它并没有像大家想的那样消失。他们卖给了军方，然后发展很快。接着卖给了合作公司做数字存储技术，然后…准备好了吗……Nex Playground 😉。Xbox赚翻了

text: Double barrel nose is crazy😂
text_zh: 双管齐下太夸张了😂

text: not the double barrel nose 🤣
text_zh: 不是那个双管鼻 🤣

text: double barrel nose 😫
text_zh: 双管齐下😫

text: the switch has a browser it just a bit of a process to get to if nintendo hasn't already patched it .
text_zh: Switch是有浏览器的，只是要费点劲才能打开，如果任天堂还没修复的话。

text: Mind you! You gotta pay monthly just to play any games you never really own anything
text_zh: 说真的！你还得每个月付钱才能玩任何游戏，你从来没真正拥有过任何东西

text: Naw answer King XBOX question do yall have a web browser
text_zh: 不，回答一下 King XBOX 的问题，你们有网页浏览器吗

text: Outselling doesnt make it better. It just means a lot of people bought it cuz its cheaper. Aint no way its gonna be able to outperform a console.
text_zh: 卖得好不代表它更好。只能说明很多人因为它便宜就买了。它不可能打败游戏主机。

text: yeah playstation does have a web browser lol
text_zh: 对，PlayStation确实有浏览器 lol

text: Ngl the Xbox kinect Star Wars game dat hoe so fun
text_zh: 说实话，那个 Xbox Kinect 的《星球大战》游戏可好玩了

text: What is that phone case
text_zh: 那个手机壳是什么？

text: It’s in Walmart stores in Georgia. Always wondered why they had it on display for sale.😁
text_zh: 佐治亚州的沃尔玛有卖。我一直好奇为什么他们会把它摆出来卖。😁

text: it's funny watching the peasants argue over which potato is the best. we all know PC master race is the only way.
text_zh: 看着一群穷鬼争论哪个土豆（游戏机）最好笑死了，我们都知道PC才是最牛逼的。
